message:
Lately, a vicious wolf
has been attacking the farmers.

If you can slay it,
I'll give you a reward.

I don't know where it is.
If you wander around long enough,
it'll find you.

It's somewhere in the meadows.
I'll reward you if you slay it.
So you slayed that damned wolf.

Here, take this quarterstaff.
It's great for blocking enemy blows.
I'll give you some coins as well.

You're claiming Arvanis the mage
burned down Elgangs cathedral?
She even stole the sword of light?

I don't know why'd she do that.
The mages of Thalmot
have always remained neutral.

No, I don't know the path to Thalmot.
I may know some spells
but I'm not one of them.

If you want clues, try visiting
the graveyard in the hills.

Apparently, some kind of incident
occurred long ago
and many of Thalmots mages ended up dead.
